name: july-day
comment: ROOT (observation-minimal) is in range and carries its subtree: norcar cancels (+3-3), amecro survives. LEGACY (2025) is out of range.

name: all-time
comment: Both roots in range. norcar still cancels; sorted count desc then taxonId asc.

name: subtree-only-window
comment: Window covers only the child/adjustment intervals (14:05-14:30), not ROOT's (14:00). The range filter applies to TOP-LEVEL records only, so nothing qualifies — an implementation that filters all records would wrongly return norcar here.
